actions: score+=goodConditionTurns*4.5; if:concentration>=6 { goodConditionTurnsMultiplier=3; score+=40 }; if:concentration>=10 { at:turn { drawCard(2); limit:1 } }

name: 天下無双
actions: perfectConditionTurns+=7; cardUsesRemaining+=1; at:afterCardUsed { if:perfectConditionTurns>=5 { concentrationMultiplier=2; score+=2; perfectConditionTurns-=1 } }

name: グランドフィナーレ
effects: at:cardMovedToHeld { if:movedCardId==787 { target:held { g.scoreTimes+=1 } } }

name: トップクオリティ
actions: cardUsesRemaining+=1; at:afterCardUsed[active] { if:isStrength { setEnthusiasmBonus(3) } }; at:afterCardUsed[mental] { if:isPreservation { setEnthusiasmBuff(0.5) } }

name: いつもあなたの隣で
effects: at:stanceChanged { if:isDirectEffect & isPreservation { target:this { g.score+=7 } }; limit:2 }

name: いつもあなたの隣で+
effects: at:stanceChanged { if:isDirectEffect & isPreservation { target:this { g.score+=7 } }; limit:2 }

actions: genki+=2; motivation+=3; at:startOfTurn { if:genki==0 { genki+=consumedGenki*0.8 }; limit:3 }

name: 教えてあげる

name: クールすぎるアイドル+
effects: at:afterCardUsed { if:usedCardBaseId == 809 & effectCounter==0 & countCards[baseId(807) & removed] > 0 { effectCounter+=1; useRandomCardFree[baseId(807)] }; limit:2 }; at:beforeStartOfTurn { effectCounter=0 }

name: 燃え盛る青い炎
actions: genki+=15; motivation+=5; at:endOfTurn { if:turnsRemaining==1 { score+=genki*1.5 }; limit:1 }

name: 燃え盛る青い炎+
actions: genki+=27; motivation+=5; at:endOfTurn { if:turnsRemaining==1 { score+=genki*1.5 }; limit:1 }

name: お姉さんの感覚
effects: at:afterCardUsed { if:countCards[baseId(813) & hand]>=1 & effectCounter==0 & countCards[baseId(811) & removed] > 0 { effectCounter+=1; useRandomCardFree[baseId(811)] }; limit:4 }; at:beforeStartOfTurn { effectCounter=0 }

name: お姉さんの感覚+
effects: at:afterCardUsed { if:countCards[baseId(813) & hand]>=1 & effectCounter==0 & countCards[baseId(811) & removed] > 0 { effectCounter+=1; useRandomCardFree[baseId(811)] }; limit:4 }; at:beforeStartOfTurn { effectCounter=0 }

name: わたしだけの思い出
effects: at:everyTurn { if:countCards[baseId(815) & removed] > 0 { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%2==1 & stamina>=maxStamina*0.8 { useRandomCardFree[baseId(815)]; limit:2 } } }

name: わたしだけの思い出+
effects: at:everyTurn { if:countCards[baseId(815) & removed] > 0 { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%2==1 & stamina>=maxStamina*0.8 { useRandomCardFree[baseId(815)]; limit:2 } } }

name: わたしを支える言葉
effects: at:motivationIncreased { if:countCards[baseId(819) & removed] > 0 & isDirectEffect { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%5==4  { useRandomCardFree[baseId(819)]; limit:2 } } }

name: わたしを支える言葉+
effects: at:motivationIncreased { if:countCards[baseId(819) & removed] > 0 & isDirectEffect { effectCounter+=1; if:effectCounter%5==4  { useRandomCardFree[baseId(819)]; limit:2 } } }

name: 理想に手が届く日まで
effects: at:cardMovedToHand { if:movedCardBaseId==821 { motivation+=3 } }

name: 理想に手が届く日まで+
effects: at:cardMovedToHand { if:movedCardBaseId==821 { motivation+=3 } }

name: 甘く溶ける心
actions: setStance(strength); drawCard; at:afterCardUsed[active] { if:stance==strength2 { setStance(preservation); limit:3 } }

name: 甘く溶ける心+
actions: setStance(strength); drawCard; at:afterCardUsed[active] { if:stance==strength2 { setStance(preservation2); limit:3 } }

name: 高みへ羽ばたく一番星
actions: fullPowerCharge+=5; cardUsesRemaining+=1; at:startOfTurn { if:isFullPower { useSelected[hand | deck | discarded | held] }; limit:1 }

name: 笑顔を生み出す一番星
actions: goodImpressionTurns+=10; cardUsesRemaining+=1; addCardToDeck(832); addCardToDeck(832); addCardToDeck(832); addCardToDeck(832); addCardToDeck(832); at:turn { moveRandomToHand[baseId(606) & (deck | discarded)]; limit:1 }

name: 星々を見下ろす一番星

actions: at:beforeCardUsed { if:usedCardBaseId==576 { nullifyCostCards+=1 }; limit:5 }; cardUsesRemaining+=1; target:effect(strength) { g.score+=11 }

name: 弱気じゃいられない！

name: 弱気じゃいられない！+

name: これぞアイドル！
actions: goodImpressionTurns+=2; if:goodImpressionTurns>=10 { at:turn { score+=goodImpressionTurns*3; limit:1 } }; if:goodImpressionTurns>=15 { at:turn { score+=goodImpressionTurns*5; limit:1; delay:1 } }

name: これぞアイドル！+
actions: goodImpressionTurns+=2; if:goodImpressionTurns>=10 { at:turn { score+=goodImpressionTurns*4.4; limit:1 } }; if:goodImpressionTurns>=15 { at:turn { score+=goodImpressionTurns*5.5; limit:1; delay:1 } }
